name: circuitTrace
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.circuitMap.every((c) => Array.isArray(c.devices) && Number.isFinite(c.wireRun) && c.wireRun >= 0)
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data.circuits (NecCodeCalc runDomain wrapper, peeled at dispatch). Maps circuits → {circuit,panel,breaker,room,devices,wireRun}; unassigned = room-less count; avgDevicesPerCircuit = mean device count. NecCodeCalc never sends `panels`, so the handler defaults panels.length || 1 → 1. Fail-closed: a non-array `devices` coerces to [] and a poisoned wireRunFeet sanitises via num() (non-finite → 0, negatives clamp) so avgDevicesPerCircuit + wireRun never leak NaN. Cards render panels/totalCircuits/unassigned/avgDevicesPerCircuit EXACTLY (field-aligned against CircuitMap). No STATE, no DB.
